children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Within the 60-day period immediately preceding the effective date of an order issued under , the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among mushroom producers and importers to ascertain whether the order shall go into effect.section 6103(b) of this title

children.heading: Approval of order
children.label: 2 Approval of order
children.text: The order shall become effective, as provided in , if the Secretary determines that the order has been approved by a majority of the producers and importers voting in the referendum, which majority, on average, annually produces and imports into the United States more than 50 percent of the mushrooms annually produced and imported by all those voting in the referendum.section 6103(b) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Effective 5 years after the date on which an order becomes effective under , the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among mushroom producers and importers to ascertain whether they favor continuation, termination, or suspension of the order.section 6103(b) of this title

children.heading: Request for referendum
children.label: B Request for referendum
children.text: Effective beginning 3 years after the date on which an order becomes effective under , the Secretary, on request of a representative group comprising 30 percent or more of the number of mushroom producers and importers, may conduct a referendum to ascertain whether producers and importers favor termination or suspension of the order.section 6103(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: within 6 months after making such determination, suspend or terminate, as appropriate, collection of assessments under the order; and

children.label: B
children.text: suspend or terminate, as appropriate, activities under the order in an orderly manner as soon as practicable.

children.heading: Manner
children.label: c Manner
children.text: Referenda conducted pursuant to this section shall be conducted in such a manner as is determined by the Secretary.
